Injuries • Psychic • Brain Fizzle

Injury Card

Brain Fizzle

You feel a strange sensation in your head, as if your brain is fizzling like a poorly made potion. Thoughts become a bit hazy, and concentrating on tasks seems more challenging

Mind Muddle
Treatment

Meditation and mental rest may help alleviate the effects.

Details

  • Category: Psychic

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 30

  • Status Effect: Confused

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Psychic

  • odds: 50

  • description: You feel a strange sensation in your head, as if your brain is fizzling like a poorly made potion. Thoughts become a bit hazy, and concentrating on tasks seems more challenging

  • treatment: Meditation and mental rest may help alleviate the effects.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 3

  • duration: 180

  • action: Apply the Psychic Injury

  • statuseffect: Confused

Injuries • Psychic • Cerebral Backfire

Injury Card

Cerebral Backfire

A backlash of psychic energy causes the victim's thoughts to ricochet, creating momentary lapses in memory and cognitive function.

Mental Feedback
Treatment

Meditation and mental exercises are required to restore clarity of mind.

Details

  • Category: Psychic

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 40

  • Status Effect: Disoriented

Injuries • Psychic • Cerebral Overload

Injury Card

Cerebral Overload

Your mind feels like it's caught in a storm of chaotic thoughts, each vying for dominance. The mental strain is excruciating, making it hard to focus on anything but the overwhelming buzz in your head.

Mind Meltdown
Treatment

Seek help from skilled healers or those attuned to psychic energies to stabilize your mind from the overload.

Details

  • Category: Psychic

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Confused

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • treatment: Seek help from skilled healers or those attuned to psychic energies to stabilize your mind from the overload.

  • statuseffect: Confused

Injuries • Psychic • Cogitation Cramp

Injury Card

Cogitation Cramp

A sudden surge of psychic energy causes sharp pain in the victim's head, making it hard to concentrate and cast spells.

Psionic Overload
Treatment

Drinking a concoction of herbal remedies can help alleviate the cramping.

Details

  • Category: Psychic

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: none

Injuries • Psychic • Mindbender's Migraine

Injury Card

Mindbender's Migraine

After a psychic attack, your mind feels like it's been tied in mental knots. Thoughts seem to echo loudly, causing sharp, sudden headaches.

Psionic Whispers
Treatment

Seek out a powerful psychic healer or rest in a quiet, calming environment.

Details

  • Category: Psychic

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: Confused

Injuries • Psychic • Mindquake Madness

Injury Card

Mindquake Madness

After a sudden burst of psychic energy, the victim's mind feels like shaken rubble, causing disorientation and difficulty focusing.

Psychic Jolt
Treatment

Rest and meditation can help alleviate the symptoms over time.

Injuries • Psychic • Psionic Echoes

Injury Card

Psionic Echoes

Psychic waves have left a lingering effect, making your own thoughts feel distant, as if being heard slightly delayed.

Mental Strain
Treatment

Meditate and focus on aligning your mind. Distractions may make the echoes worse.

Details

  • Category: Psychic

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 15

Injuries • Psychic • Psionic Feedback

Injury Card

Psionic Feedback

A surge of mental energy overwhelms your senses, causing sharp pain behind your eyes and confusion in your thoughts. It's like a magic missile fired directly into your mind.

Mindquake
Treatment

Rest and mental relaxation are key to recovering from this powerful mental backlash.

Details

  • Category: Psychic

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 40

  • Status Effect: Disoriented

Injuries • Psychic • Psionic Meltdown

Injury Card

Psionic Meltdown

The victim experiences a catastrophic surge of psychic power, overwhelming their senses and causing intense mental anguish.

Mind Eruption
Treatment

Only a skilled psychic healer can mend the shattered psyche of the victim.

Details

  • Category: Psychic

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

Injuries • Psychic • Spiritual Static

Injury Card

Spiritual Static

Your mind feels scrambled, like picking up a station between radio frequencies. It's as if your own thoughts are being overshadowed by a mysterious background noise.

Etheric Interference
Treatment

Engage in calming activities and avoid mental strain until the effects wear off.

Details

  • Category: Psychic

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: none
